title: Srinagar、Jammu and Kashmir — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Srinagar、Jammu and Kashmir的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Srinagar是Jammu and Kashmir的一个城市，人口约1,250,000。The summer capital of Jammu and Kashmir, famous for its Dal Lake, houseboats, Mughal gardens, and stunning Himalayan scenery.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
